overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking through a detailed urban city environment on a clear autumn day. The character exits a narrow archway between stone buildings and proceeds down a busy city street with pedestrians, vehicles, and various urban elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between large stone archway buildings

events.description: exits the narrow stone archway into the open city street

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking steadily through the narrow passage between large stone buildings toward the open street ahead

entered.detail: large light-colored stone building forming the left side of the archway passage
large light-colored stone building forming the right side of the archway passage
trees with yellow and orange autumn foliage visible beyond the archway
open city street visible at the end of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks through a narrow passage between two massive stone archway buildings. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches the opening to a bright, open city street with autumn trees visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with mixed modern glass and historic brick architecture

events.description: pedestrians on the sidewalk take out smartphones to photograph Spider-Man as he passes

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking down the city street approaching an intersection, pedestrians notice and photograph him

notable_agents.action: woman holding up smartphone to take photos of Spider-Man

entered.detail: large historic brown brick building with multiple windows dominating the right side
modern glass facade office building reflecting sunlight
yellow taxi cab driving down the street in the distance
upcoming intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk visible ahead

segments.scene_description: Having exited the archway, Spider-Man walks down an open urban street lined with a modern glass building on the left and a historic brown brick building on the right. Pedestrians on the sidewalk notice the character and begin taking photos with their phones as a yellow taxi drives in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with crosswalk and steam vent

events.description: steps onto the white striped crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street
passes steam rising from a manhole cover on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crossing the intersection, walking past steam vent and parked vehicles while pedestrians watch

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving down the street past the intersection

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing stripes on the asphalt
steam rising from a manhole cover on the left side of the road
white sedan parked on the right side of the street near the intersection
traffic signal lights suspended over the intersection showing green
glass and metal bus stop shelter with curved roof on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the wide intersection. Steam rises from a manhole on the left while the character passes a white sedan parked on the right. Pedestrians watch and take photos as the traffic light shows green.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with bus stop and row of parked cars

events.description: passes bus stop shelter with glass roof and green benches on the right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking along the street passing the bus stop and row of parked cars on the right

entered.detail: yellow 'BUS STOP' text painted on the asphalt road surface
blue United States Postal Service mailbox on the sidewalk
green newspaper vending machines lined up on the sidewalk
row of various parked cars along the right curb

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, Spider-Man walks along a street with a bus stop shelter on the right. The character passes yellow 'BUS STOP' markings on the road, a blue USPS mailbox, and green newspaper boxes while pedestrians walk along the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with delivery truck and subway entrance railing

events.description: passes closely by the large white delivery truck on the right side, temporarily blocking view of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking past the parked delivery truck and green subway entrance railing

green metal railing and stairs leading down to subway entrance
gray sedan parked in front of the delivery truck

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man continues down the street, approaching and passing a large white delivery truck labeled 'Whole Caboodle Mart' parked on the right. A green subway entrance railing is visible near the truck as the character walks past the parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with storefronts and distant skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man continuing down the city street with commercial buildings on both sides, approaching the distant skyscrapers

entered.detail: commercial storefront buildings with awnings on the left side
commercial buildings with large windows on the right side
tall skyscrapers visible in the distance at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: Having passed the delivery truck, Spider-Man continues down an open commercial street lined with storefronts on both sides. The street stretches ahead toward distant skyscrapers visible in the center of the frame as pedestrians walk along the sidewalks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Spider-Man transitions from a confined stone passage into a sprawling, vibrant city thoroughfare. It begins behind the character as he moves through a narrow archway, emerging from the shadows into the bright light of an open street lined with autumn trees and contrasting modern glass and historic brick architecture. As he proceeds, the scene shifts toward a wide intersection where steam rises from a manhole and pedestrians pause to take photos while he crosses the street. The camera then follows him past urban fixtures including a bus stop, a blue USPS mailbox, and a large white delivery truck parked near a green subway entrance. Finally, the view expands as he continues down a commercial street lined with storefronts, stretching forward toward a horizon of distant skyscrapers.
